svg.title: Model Development Summary
svg.desc: A summary of the development path from the official anchor to the w0035 challenger model, including rejected follow-ups.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: w0035 retained as final fixed-holdout model

div.style: color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(30, 41, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: future work: more labeled target-like data / anatomy-aware pretraining
